title: Dua Ya Uddati - Dua for sahar time (commencing the fast)

duas.title: Dua Ya Uddati - Dua-e-Sahar
duas.description: Shaykh al-Tusi has mentioned the following supplication to be said at the last hours of the Month of Ramadan nights (Time of Suhoor):

segments.translation: O my means in troubles!
O my Companion in hardships!
O the Provider of my amenities!
O the utmost of my desires!
It is You Who conceals my defects,
relieves my apprehensions,
and overlooks my slips.
So, (please do) forgive my sin.
O Allah, I pray You for the submission of faith
before I encounter the submission of humiliation in Hellfire.

segments.arabic: يَا وَاحِدُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا صَمَدُ
segments.transliteration: ya wahidu ya ahadu ya samadu
segments.translation: O One!: O Absolute! O Besought of all!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
segments.transliteration: ya man lam yalid wa lam yulad
segments.translation: O He Who neither begets nor is He begotten,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun
segments.translation: and there is none like to Him
O He Who confers upon one who beseeches Him
on account of His sympathy and mercy,

segments.transliteration: wa yabtadi'u bilkhayri man lam yas'alhu
segments.translation: and initially grants welfare to those who have not asked for it,
on account of His liberality and generosity!
I beseech You in the name of Your endless generosity
to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa hab li rahmatan wasi`atan jami`atan
segments.translation: and bestow upon me with mercy—vast and comprehensive—
by which I can win the welfare of this world as well as the Next World.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا تُبْتُ إِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ عُدْتُ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni astaghfiruka lima tubtu ilayka minhu thumm `udtu fihi
segments.translation: O Allah, I implore for Your forgiveness of the sins from which I had repented to You but I committed them again.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَرَدْتُ بِهِ وَجْهَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa astaghfiruka likulli khayrin aradtu bihi wajhaka
segments.translation: I implore for Your forgiveness of my righteous acts that although I intended them purely for Your sake,
some purposes that are not intended for You intruded upon them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and pardon my transgression and my offenses,
in the name of Your forbearance and magnanimity. O All-generous!
O He Whose beseecher will never be disappointed!
O He Whose His rewards will never run out!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَلاَ فَلاَ شَيْءَ فَوْقَهُ
segments.translation: O He Who is so Elevated that nothing can ever be higher than He is
and Who is so Nigh that nothing can ever be closer that He is!
(Please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and have mercy upon me,
O He Who split asunder the sea for (Prophet) Moses,
this very night, this very night, this very night,
this very hour, this very hour, this very hour.
O Allah, (please do) purify my heart from hypocrisy,
my acts from showing off,
my tongue from telling untruths,
and my eye from treason.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ تَعْلَمُ خَائِنَةَ ٱلأَعْيُنِ وَمَا تُخْفِي ٱلصُّدُورُ
segments.transliteration: fa'innaka ta`lamu kha'inata al-a`yuni wa ma tukhfi alssuduru
segments.translation: You verily know the stealthy looks and that which the breasts conceal.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ هٰذَا مَقَامُ ٱلْعَائِذِ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi hadha maqamu al`a'idhi bika min alnnari
segments.translation: O my Lord, this is the manner of him who seeks Your protection from Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَقَامُ ٱلْمُسْتَجِيرِ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: hadha maqamu almustajiri bika min alnnari
segments.translation: This is the manner of him who seeks Your shelter against Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَقَامُ ٱلْمُسْتَغِيثِ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: hadha maqamu almustaghithi bika min alnnari
segments.translation: This is the manner of him who seeks Your aid against Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَقَامُ ٱلْهَارِبِ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: hadha maqamu alharibi ilayka min alnnari
segments.translation: This is the manner of him who flees to You from Hellfire.

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَقَامُ مَنْ يَبُوءُ لَكَ بِخَطِيئَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: hadha maqamu man yabu'u laka bikhati'atihi
segments.translation: This is the manner of him who returns to You carrying his offenses,
confessing of his sins,
and repenting to You—his Lord.
This is the manner of the miserable and poor.
This is the manner of the fearful and seeker of Your refuge.
This is the manner of the aggrieved and distressed.
This is the manner of the depressing and gloomy.
This is the manner of the stranger and drowned.
This is the manner of the alienated and frightened.

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَقَامُ مَنْ لاَ يَجِدُ لِذَنْبِهِ غَافِراً غَيْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: hadha maqamu man la yajidu lidhanbihi ghafiran ghayraka
segments.translation: This is the manner of him who cannot find anyone save You to forgive his sins,

segments.transliteration: wa la lida`fihi muqawiyyan illa anta
segments.translation: who cannot find anyone save You to give him power,
and who cannot find anyone save You to relieve his grief.
O Allah! O All-generous!

segments.arabic: لاَ تُحْرِقْ وَجْهِي بِٱلنَّارِ بَعْدَ سُجُودِي لَكَ وَتَعْفِيرِي
segments.transliteration: la tuhriq wajhi bilnnari ba`da sujudi laka wa ta`firi
segments.translation: (please) do not burn my face with Hellfire after I have prostrated myself before You and I have soiled my face for You.
Of course, this is not a personal favor that I have done to myself;

segments.arabic: بَلْ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ وَٱلْمَنُّ وَٱلتَّفَضُّلُ عَلَيَّ
segments.translation: rather, it is on account of Your praiseworthy favor to and guidance of me.

segments.arabic: إِرْحَمْ أَيْ رَبِّ أَيْ رَبِّ أَيْ رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: irham ay rabbi ay rabbi ay rabbi…
segments.translation: So, have mercy, O Lord! O Lord! O Lord…
upon my weakness,
upon my confusedness,
upon the softness of my skin,
upon the separation of my organs,

segments.transliteration: wa tanathura lahmi wa jismi wa jasadi
segments.translation: upon the dispersal of my flesh, body, and corpse,

segments.transliteration: wa wahdati wa wahshati fi qabri
segments.translation: upon my loneliness and lonesomeness in my grave,
and upon my anxiety at the least misfortune that inflicts me.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ قُرَّةَ ٱلْعَيْنِ وَٱلاِغْتِبَاطَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka ya rabbi qurrata al`ayni walightibata
segments.translation: I beseech You, O Lord, for delight and happiness
on the Day of regret and remorse.

segments.arabic: بَيِّضْ وَجْهِي يَا رَبِّ يَوْمَ تَسْوَدُّ ٱلْوُجُوهُ
segments.transliteration: bayyid wajhi ya rabbi yawma taswaddu alwujuhu
segments.translation: (Please do) whiten my face, O Lord, when some faces will be blackened.
(Please do) secure me against the Gravest Horror.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ يَوْمَ تُقَلَّبُ ٱلْقُلُوبُ وَٱلأَبْصَارُ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka albushra yawma tuqallabu alqulubu wal-absaru
segments.translation: I beseech You for good tidings when hearts and sights shall be turned about
and for good tidings when I depart this life.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَرْجُوهُ عَوْناً لِي فِي حَيَاتِي
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi arjuhu `awnan li fi hayati
segments.translation: All praise be to Allah Whom I hope for supporting me in my life
and Whom I want to act as my Provision on the day of my neediness.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَدْعُوهُ وَلاَ أَدْعُو غَيْرَهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi ad`uhu wa la ad`u ghayrahu
segments.translation: All praise be to Allah Whom alone do I beseech and I never beseech anyone rather than Him;

segments.transliteration: wa law da`awtu ghayrahu lakhayyaba du`a'i
segments.translation: and even if I beseech anyone else, he will definitely let me down.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَرْجُوهُ وَلاَ أَرْجُو غَيْرَهُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi arjuhu wa la arju ghayrahu
segments.translation: All praise be to Allah for Whom I hope and I never hope for anyone rather than Him;

segments.transliteration: wa law rajawtu ghayrahu la-akhlafa raja'i
segments.translation: and even if I hope for anyone else, he will definitely disappoint me.
All praise be to Allah, the All-benefactor, the All-donor,
the All-favorer, the All-liberal,
the Lord of Majesty and Honor,
the Source of all bounties,
the Cause of all good deeds,
the Ultimate Goal of all desires,
and the Answerer of all needs.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: warzuqni alyaqina wa husna alzzanni bika
segments.translation: and grant me conviction and having good idea about You,
fix my hope for You in my heart,
and deprive me of putting my hope in anyone other than You,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَرْجُوَ غَيْرَكَ وَلاَ أَثِقَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la arjwa ghayraka wa la athiqa illa bika
segments.translation: so that I shall hope for none but You and I shall trust none but You.
O He Who is Benignant to whom He pleases!

segments.arabic: أُلْطُفْ لِي فِي جَمِيعِ أَحْوَالِي بِمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ultuf li fi jami`i ahwali bima tuhibbu wa tarda
segments.translation: (Please do) have benignity to me in all my manners in the very way that You like and please.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إِنِّي ضَعِيفٌ عَلَىٰ ٱلنَّارِ فَلاَ تُعَذِّبْنِي بِٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi inni da`ifun `ala alnnari fala tu`adhdhibni bilnnari
segments.translation: O my Lord, I am too weak to encounter Your Fire; therefore, (please) do not punish me with Your Fire.

segments.transliteration: ya rabbi irham du`a'i wa tadarru`i
segments.translation: O my Lord, (please do) have mercy upon my prayers, my earnest imploring,

segments.transliteration: wa khawfi wa dhulli wa maskanati
segments.translation: my fear, my humiliation, my neediness,
my seeking Your protection, and my seeking Your refuge.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ إِنِّي ضَعِيفٌ عَنْ طَلَبِ ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi inni da`ifun `an talabi alddunya
segments.translation: O my Lord, I am too weak to seek earnings in this world
and You are Ample-giving and All-generous.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ بِقُوَّتِكَ عَلَىٰ ذٰلِكَ
segments.translation: I beseech You, O my Lord, in the name of Your power over that,
Your supremacy over that,
Your dispensing with that,
and my urgent need for that
to grant me sustenance in this year,
in this month,
on this day,
at this hour—

segments.arabic: رِزْقاً تُغْنِينِي بِهِ عَنْ تَكَلُّفِ مَا فِي أَيْدِي ٱلنَّاسِ
segments.transliteration: rizqan tughnini bihi `an takallufi ma fi aydi alnnasi
segments.translation: sustenance by which You may make me dispense with what the others possess,
from Your sustenance, legal and nice.
O my Lord, from You do I ask,
for You do I desire,
and for You do I hope;
and You are the worthiest of being hoped.
I hope for none but You
and I trust in none but You.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
O my Lord, I have wronged myself;
so, (please do) forgive me, have mercy upon me, and grant me good health.
O Hearer of all sounds!
O He Who takes precedence over everything that passes away!

segments.transliteration: wa ya bari'a alnnufusi ba`da almawti
segments.translation: O Reviver of all souls after death!
O He Whom is not screened by murk!
O He Whom is not made confused by sounds!
O He Whom is not engaged by something against another thing!

segments.arabic: أَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَفْضَلَ مَا سَأَلَكَ
segments.transliteration: a`ti muhammadan salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi afdala ma sa'alaka
segments.translation: (Please do) grant Muhammad—peace be upon him and his Household—the best of all that for which he has besought You,
the best of all that which has been asked from You for him,

segments.arabic: وَأَفْضَلَ مَا أَنْتَ مَسْؤُولٌ لَهُ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa afdala ma anta mas'ulun lahu ila yawmi alqiyamati
segments.translation: and the best all that which You shall be asked for him up to the Resurrection Day;

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِيَ ٱلْعَافِيَةَ حَتَّىٰ تُهَنِّئَنِي ٱلْمَعِيشَةَ
segments.transliteration: wa hab liya al`afiyata hatta tuhanni'ani alma`ishata
segments.translation: and grant me good health so that I may enjoy my life,

segments.arabic: وَٱخْتِمْ لِي بِخَيْرٍ حَتَّىٰ لاَ تَضُرَّنِي ٱلذُّنُوبُ
segments.transliteration: wakhtim li bikhayrin hatta la tadurrani aldhdhunubu
segments.translation: an end up my life with a happy end so that my sins may not injure me.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ رَضِّنِي بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَسْأَلَ أَحَداً شَيْئاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma raddini bima qasamta li hatta la as'ala ahadan shay'an
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) make me satisfied with that which You have decided for me so that I will not ask anyone else for anything.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
open to me the stores of Your mercy,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْنِي رَحْمَةً لاَ تُعَذِّبُنِي بَعْدَهَا أَبَداً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: warhamni rahmatan la tu`adhdhibuni ba`daha abadan fi alddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: cover me with mercy from You owing to which You will not punish me neither in this world nor in the Hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ ٱلْوَاسِعِ رِزْقاً حَلاَلاً طَيِّباً
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min fadlika alwasi`i rizqan halalan tayyiban
segments.translation: grant me legal and pleasant sustenance from Your limitless favor

segments.arabic: لاَ تُفْقِرُنِي إِلَىٰ أَحَدٍ بَعْدَهُ سِوَاكَ
segments.transliteration: la tufqiruni ila ahadin ba`dahu siwaka
segments.translation: owing to which You will make me dispense with anyone other than You;
increasing my gratitude to You
and my neediness and submission before You,

segments.transliteration: wa bika `amman siwaka ghinan wa ta`affufan
segments.translation: and increasing my dispensing with and doing without everyone save You.
O All-benefactor! O All-donor!
O All-favorer! O All-liberal!
O All-omnipotent! O All-sovereign!
(Please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
and relieve me from all grievances,
decide the most excellent for me,

segments.transliteration: wa barik li fi jami`i umuri
segments.translation: bless all my affairs,
and settle all my needs.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لِي مَا أَخَافُ تَعْسِيرَهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma yassir li ma akhafu ta`sirahu
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) make easy for me all that which I anticipate to be difficult,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ تَيْسِيرَ مَا أَخَافُ تَعْسِيرَهُ عَلَيْكَ سَهْلٌ يَسِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: fa'inna taysira ma akhafu ta`sirahu `alayka sahlun yasirun
segments.translation: for it is quite easy for You to make easy for me that which I anticipate to be difficult.

segments.transliteration: wa sahhil li ma akhafu huzunatahu
segments.translation: (Please do) facilitate for me that I anticipate to be complicated,
give vent to that which I anticipate to be narrow,
save me from that which I anticipate to cause me distress,
and guard me from that which I anticipate to cause me misfortune.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
O Allah, (please do) fill in my heart with love for You,
fear from You,
belief in You,
faith in You,
dread from You,
and eagerness to You.
O Lord of Majesty and Honor!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ لَكَ حُقُوقاً فَتَصَدَّقْ بِهَا عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna laka huquqan fatasaddaq biha `alayya
segments.translation: O Allah, I owe You some rights; so, (please do) consider them alms and excuse me from their liabilities.
I also owe people some responsibilities; so, (please do) release me from their charges.

segments.transliteration: wa qad awjabta likulli dayfin qiran
segments.translation: You have instructed us to honor our guests,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا ضَيْفُكَ فَٱجْعَلْ قِرَايَ ٱللَّيْلَةَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ
segments.transliteration: wa ana dayfuka faj`al qiraya allaylata aljannata
segments.translation: and I am Your guest at this night; so, (please do) decide Paradise for me as honor at this night.
O Grantor of Paradise!
O Grantor of forgiveness!

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa bika
segments.translation: There is no power nor might save with You.

_index_meta.title: Dua Ya Uddati - Dua for sahar time (commencing the fast)
